title: lantana camara var. mista
intro: Lantana camara var. mista is a tropical plant species that is a variant of the lantana camara plant, characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers and leaves with a distinctive, pungent aroma. The medicinal properties of Lantana camara var. mista include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and provide relief from digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
